# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Présentation

Serveur web Node.js simple qui sert une page HTML affichant "Bonjour !".

## Commandes

```
node server.js   # démarrer le serveur
npm start        # équivalent à la commande ci-dessus
```

Le serveur tourne sur http://localhost:3000.

## Architecture

- `server.js` — serveur HTTP natif Node.js, sert les fichiers du dossier `public/`
- `public/index.html` — page web principale













ggzeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeg











<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<title>Tribu Nature — Box Bien-être</title>
<meta name="description" content="Tribu Nature — Box bien-être et coffrets à offrir, avec présentation de la boutique à Vif." />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://static.wixstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link rel="dns-prefetch" href="//static.wixstatic.com">
<link rel="preload" as="image" href="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_415d31f848c0448ba1ddb532e8d05440~mv2.png" imagesizes="(max-width: 900px) 100vw, 50vw" />
<link rel="preload" as="image" href="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_eb93e1f4b26b470c80b073c777be559b~mv2.png" imagesizes="(max-width: 900px) 100vw, 50vw" />
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#f5f0e8; --bg-2:#ede5d8;
  --ink:#2c1f0e;
  --gold:#9B6E2A;
  --glass:rgba(255,255,255,.55); --line:rgba(44,31,14,.12);
  --shadow-soft: rgba(44,31,14,.12);
  --shadow: rgba(44,31,14,.18);
  --shadow-strong: rgba(44,31,14,.32);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{margin:0;padding:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg),var(--bg-2));color:var(--ink);font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Arial;line-height:1.45;scroll-behavior:smooth;width:100%;max-width:100%;overflow-x:hidden;touch-action:pan-y;overscroll-behavior-x:none;}
a{color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none}
img{display:block;max-width:100%;height:auto}
figure{margin:0}
.section{padding:clamp(26px,4.2vw,64px) 0;content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:1000px}
.container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:clamp(16px,3vw,28px)}
.small{font-size:.9rem;opacity:.85}
.nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1000;backdrop-filter:saturate(180%) blur(8px);background:rgba(245,240,232,.85);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);}
.nav .container{padding-top:8px;padding-bottom:8px}
.nav .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.brand img{width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.15));transition:transform .35s}
.brand:hover img{transform:rotate(-4deg) scale(1.04)}
.brand .name{font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.5px;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--ink)}
.menu-toggle{background:rgba(44,31,14,.08);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.2);border-radius:999px;padding:6px 12px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;color:var(--ink);}
.pill{padding:.34rem .7rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(44,31,14,.07);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.15);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s,filter .2s;font-size:.95rem;letter-spacing:.12px;white-space:nowrap;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1.2;color:var(--ink);}
.pill:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 24px 60px var(--shadow)}
.badge{padding:.38rem .65rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(155,110,42,.15);border:1px solid rgba(155,110,42,.45);color:#7a4e18;font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;display:inline-block;}
.nav-home{width:100%;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:center;}
.nav-home .nav-home-links{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto;flex:1 1 auto;}
.nav-home .boutique-cta{margin-left:auto;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8c97a,#9B6E2A);color:#fff;border-color:#c8a046;box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(155,110,42,.35),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding:.5rem .9rem;border-radius:999px;}
@media(max-width:900px){.nav-home .boutique-cta{order:3;margin-left:0;width:100%;justify-content:center}.nav-home .nav-home-links{display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;width:100%}.nav-home.menu-open .nav-home-links{display:flex}}
.btn{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.14);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.3px;font-size:1rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;justify-content:center;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s,filter .2s;}
.btn.primary{background:var(--gold);color:#fff;border-color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(155,110,42,.28)}
.btn.primary:hover{filter:brightness(1.08)}
.btn.ghost{background:rgba(44,31,14,.08);color:var(--ink);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.15)}
.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 30px 70px var(--shadow-strong)}
.btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.hero{position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:clamp(18px,3vw,32px);align-items:stretch;padding:clamp(18px,3vw,36px) 0;}
@media(max-width:900px){.hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:22px}}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(28px,4.6vw,54px);line-height:1.05;margin:.2em 0 .4em;color:var(--ink)}
.hero p.lead{font-size:clamp(15px,1.6vw,18px);opacity:.85;max-width:60ch;color:var(--ink)}
.media{position:relative;border-radius:24px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 24px 60px var(--shadow),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(44,31,14,.08);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.media:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 34px 90px var(--shadow-strong)}
.media img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;aspect-ratio:4/3;transition:transform .3s ease;}
.media-hero-box img{transform:scale(1.06);}
.skel{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(44,31,14,.06),rgba(44,31,14,.1),rgba(44,31,14,.06));background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.1s infinite linear;}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:200% 0}100%{background-position:-200% 0}}
.h2{font-size:clamp(22px,3.4vw,36px);margin:0 0 18px;line-height:1.15;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink)}
.section .h2,.section .section-intro{text-align:center;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}
.grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:22px;align-items:stretch}
@media(min-width:900px){.grid-2{grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr}}
.card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.7);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:clamp(16px,2vw,24px);box-shadow:0 24px 60px var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 34px 90px var(--shadow-strong)}
.specs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:18px}
.specs .chip{background:rgba(155,110,42,.1);border:1px solid rgba(155,110,42,.25);padding:.6rem .8rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.9rem;white-space:nowrap;opacity:.9;text-align:center;color:var(--ink)}
.box-desc{margin-top:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.5);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.45;box-shadow:0 16px 40px var(--shadow-soft)}
.box-desc b{color:var(--gold);font-weight:600}
.box-tip{display:inline-block;margin-top:10px;font-size:.85rem;background:rgba(155,110,42,.1);border:1px solid rgba(155,110,42,.3);color:#7a4e18;border-radius:10px;padding:8px 10px}
#box .media{aspect-ratio:unset;}
#box .media img{object-fit:contain;height:auto;width:100%;aspect-ratio:auto;}
@media(min-width:900px){#box .media{height:auto;align-self:center;}}
.other-boxes .section-intro{max-width:60ch;opacity:.8;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.4;margin:-8px auto 24px;text-align:center;color:var(--ink);}
.box-grid{display:grid;gap:16px}
@media(min-width:900px){.box-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
.box-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.65);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 20px 50px var(--shadow);cursor:pointer;transition:.22s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;}
.box-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 30px 80px var(--shadow-strong)}
.box-card .thumb{width:100%;height:210px;background:#ede0cf;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden}
.box-card .thumb img{width:110%;height:110%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .26s ease;}
.box-card:hover .thumb img{transform:scale(1.06)}
.box-card .body{padding:14px 16px 16px}
.box-card .body h3{margin:0 0 8px;display:inline-block;padding:.25rem .8rem;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8c97a,#9B6E2A);color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:.3px;box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(155,110,42,.35);}
.box-card .body p{color:var(--ink);font-size:.92rem;margin:6px 0 4px}
.gift-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:#D63031;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.price-line{margin-top:8px;font-size:.95rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:baseline;}
.price-old{color:rgba(44,31,14,.45);text-decoration:line-through;}
.price-new{color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;}
.tagbar{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:8px}
.tag{font-size:.78rem;padding:.2rem .55rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(155,110,42,.1);border:1px solid rgba(155,110,42,.25);color:#7a4e18}
.kpisWrap .section-intro{max-width:60ch;font-size:.95rem;opacity:.8;line-height:1.4;margin:-8px auto 24px;text-align:center;}
.kpis{display:grid;gap:16px;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr))}
.kpi{background:rgba(255,255,255,.65);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:22px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 20px 50px var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.kpi:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 30px 80px var(--shadow-strong)}
.kpi .num{font-size:36px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);line-height:1.1}
.kpi .lab{font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.4;opacity:.85;color:var(--ink)}
.info-wrapper{background:rgba(255,255,255,.65);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:18px;display:grid;gap:20px;box-shadow:0 24px 60px var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.info-wrapper:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 34px 90px var(--shadow-strong)}
@media(min-width:900px){.info-wrapper{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:start}}
.shop-photo{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.08);box-shadow:0 14px 30px var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.shop-photo:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 30px 80px var(--shadow-strong)}
.shop-block{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}
.shop-details{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:10px 14px;align-items:start;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.4}
.shop-details .key{opacity:.7;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600}
.shop-details .val{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink)}
.rating-line{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:6px 10px;line-height:1.4}
.star{width:18px;height:18px;background:linear-gradient(#FFD36A,#E3B64D);clip-path:polygon(50% 0%,61% 35%,98% 35%,68% 57%,79% 91%,50% 70%,21% 91%,32% 57%,2% 35%,39% 35%)}
.short-ctas{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.short-ctas .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center;font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800}
.reviewsTN .header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:18px}
.reviewsTN .sub{opacity:.85;margin-top:6px;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.4;max-width:70ch;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;color:var(--ink)}
.slider{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.slides{display:flex;transition:transform .5s ease}
.slide{min-width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:12px}
.frame{position:relative;background:rgba(255,255,255,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(2px);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:28px;padding:26px 20px;max-width:1020px;box-shadow:0 24px 60px var(--shadow)}
.stars{color:#D4A017;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:4px;text-align:center}
.quote{font-size:clamp(18px,2.2vw,22px);text-align:center;margin:10px auto 14px;max-width:60ch;line-height:1.4;color:var(--ink)}
.author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;justify-content:center;opacity:.85;font-size:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;text-align:center;color:var(--ink)}
.badge-round{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(155,110,42,.1);border:1px solid rgba(155,110,42,.2);font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;color:var(--gold)}
.slider-dots{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}
.dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(44,31,14,.2);cursor:pointer}
.dot.active{background:var(--gold)}
.arrow{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:rgba(255,255,255,.6);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.2);backdrop-filter:blur(3px);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:999px;display:grid;place-items:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;font-weight:600;line-height:1;color:var(--ink)}
.arrow:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.9)}
.arrow.left{left:6px}.arrow.right{right:6px}
.social{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}
@media(min-width:900px){.social{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.social-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.65);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;box-shadow:0 24px 60px var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.social-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 34px 90px var(--shadow-strong)}
.social-card strong{color:var(--ink)}.social-card .small{color:rgba(44,31,14,.65)}
.lightbox{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2000;background:rgba(44,31,14,.4);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px}
.lightbox[aria-hidden="false"]{display:flex}
.panel{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fdf8f0,#f5ede0);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.12);border-radius:24px;box-shadow:0 40px 120px var(--shadow-strong);width:min(1000px,92vw);max-height:90vh;overflow:auto;padding:20px 24px 24px;display:grid;gap:20px;color:var(--ink)}
@media(min-width:880px){.panel{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.panel-head{grid-column:1 / -1;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px}
.panel-head h3{margin:0;font-size:1.3rem;line-height:1.2;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink)}
.close-btn{background:rgba(44,31,14,.08);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.15);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 10px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
.panel-text p{margin-top:0;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.45;opacity:.95;color:var(--ink)}
.benefits{display:grid;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 16px}
.benefit{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.4;opacity:.95}
.benefit .tick{color:var(--gold);font-weight:700}
.gallery-mini{display:grid;gap:8px;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(120px,1fr))}
.gallery-mini img{width:100%;height:120px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);box-shadow:0 20px 40px var(--shadow);transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s}
.gallery-mini img:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 34px 90px var(--shadow-strong)}
.panel-cta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:16px}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.reveal.is-visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.section{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px) scale(.98);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease;will-change:opacity,transform}
.section.is-visible{opacity:1;transform:none}
#chiffres{opacity:1;transform:none}
.footer{padding:40px 0 60px;border-top:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.1);opacity:.9;font-size:.95rem;color:var(--ink)}
.brandline{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin:10px 0 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
.brandline .pill{font-size:.8rem;line-height:1.2}
.footer-legal{margin-top:12px;font-size:.85rem;opacity:.9}
.footer-legal button{background:none;border:none;padding:0;margin:0;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;}
@media(max-width:900px){.container{padding-left:18px;padding-right:18px;}.section{padding-top:26px;padding-bottom:40px;}.hero{padding-top:24px;padding-bottom:30px;}}
@media(max-width:600px){.box-card .thumb{height:190px;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header class="nav" role="banner">
  <div class="container wrap">
    <a class="brand" href="#decouvrir" aria-label="Tribu Nature — Accueil">
      <img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_60a271c62c4040f79a69cd32a95c9cd9~mv2.png" alt="Logo Tribu Nature" width="56" height="56" loading="eager" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high">
      <div class="name">Tribu Nature</div>
    </a>
    <nav class="small nav-home" aria-label="Navigation">
      <button class="menu-toggle" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Ouvrir le menu">☰</button>
      <div class="nav-home-links">
        <a href="#decouvrir" class="pill">Découvrir</a>
        <a href="#box" class="pill">La Box</a>
        <a href="#autres-box" class="pill">Nos box</a>
        <a href="#chiffres" class="pill">Chiffres</a>
        <a href="#infos" class="pill">Infos boutique</a>
        <a href="#avis" class="pill">Avis</a>
        <a href="#reseaux" class="pill">Réseaux</a>
      </div>
      <a href="https://tribu-nature-boutique.fr" class="pill boutique-cta" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">La Boutique</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<main id="app" role="main">

  <section class="hero container section" id="decouvrir">
    <div class="reveal">
      <span class="badge">Nouveau • Lancement</span>
      <h1>Bagues de Massage <span style="color:var(--gold)">Shiatsu</span></h1>
      <p class="lead">La box bien-être élégante : coffret beige, étiquette bleu nuit, accents dorés, présentation soignée. Idéale à offrir.</p>
      <div class="ctas" style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:14px">
        <a class="btn primary" href="https://buy.stripe.com/00w6oI7wqao25hm4Locs800" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Passer commande</a>
        <a class="btn ghost" href="#box">Voir le contenu</a>
        <a class="btn ghost" href="#infos">Visiter la boutique</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <figure class="media media-hero-box reveal skel">
      <img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_415d31f848c0448ba1ddb532e8d05440~mv2.png" alt="Coffret premium — La Box Shiatsu" loading="eager" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high">
    </figure>
  </section>

  <section class="section container grid-2" id="box">
    <div class="card reveal">
      <h2 class="h2">La Box Shiatsu</h2>
      <p style="max-width:60ch;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.45">Coffret <b>bleu nuit</b> au marquage <b>doré</b>, calage en fibres naturelles, livré avec carte explicative. Une expérience premium dès l'ouverture.</p>
      <div class="specs">
        <div class="chip">Pochon inclus</div>
        <div class="chip">Carte explicative incluse</div>
      </div>
      <div class="box-desc">
        <p>Les bagues de massage shiatsu stimulent doucement les points d'acupression au bout des doigts. Elles peuvent aider à <b>relâcher la pression nerveuse</b>, <b>réduire le stress</b> et <b>détendre les mains</b>.</p>
        <p>Utilisation : faites rouler la bague 30–60 s par doigt, de la base vers l'extrémité, en respirant profondément.</p>
        <div class="box-tip">Astuce : gardez-en une dans la poche → 30 s suffisent pour relâcher la tension.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ctas" style="margin-top:18px">
        <a class="btn primary" href="https://buy.stripe.com/00w6oI7wqao25hm4Locs800" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Passer commande</a>
        <a class="btn ghost" href="#chiffres">Voir les bénéfices</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <figure class="media reveal skel" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="document.getElementById('autres-box').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      <img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_eb93e1f4b26b470c80b073c777be559b~mv2.png" alt="Visuel promo — La Box Shiatsu" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    </figure>
  </section>

  <section class="section container other-boxes" id="autres-box">
    <h2 class="h2">Découvrez nos autres box</h2>
    <p class="section-intro">Trois ambiances, trois expériences. Cliquez pour voir le contenu et les bénéfices.</p>
    <div class="box-grid">
      <article class="box-card" data-modal="boxRelax" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Ouvrir Bague d'acupression">
        <div class="gift-badge" aria-hidden="true">🎁</div>
        <div class="thumb skel"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bague d'acupression" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
        <div class="body">
          <h3>Bague d'acupression</h3>
          <p>Auto massage pour lâcher prise. Retrouver Quiétude &amp; sérénité.</p>
          <div class="price-line"><span class="price-new">9 €</span><span style="font-size:.82rem;opacity:.7">l'unité</span></div>
          <div class="tagbar"><span class="tag">Détente</span><span class="tag">Anti-stress</span></div>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="box-card" data-modal="boxEnergie" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Ouvrir la Box Énergie">
        <div class="gift-badge" aria-hidden="true">🎁</div>
        <div class="thumb skel"><img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_78682bc326684b4ca0ef44566d05c3e9~mv2.png" alt="Box Énergie" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
        <div class="body">
          <h3>Box Énergie</h3>
          <p>Poupées "tracas" artisanales pour dissiper les soucis.</p>
          <div class="price-line"><span class="price-new">9,97 €</span></div>
          <div class="tagbar"><span class="tag">Poupées de soucis</span><span class="tag">Rituel apaisant</span></div>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="box-card" data-modal="boxDecouverte" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Ouvrir Rouleau Quartz Rose">
        <div class="gift-badge" aria-hidden="true">🎁</div>
        <div class="thumb skel"><img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_ae622ffe36ef42fea2eb27294a4cf34a~mv2.png" alt="Rouleau Quartz Rose" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
        <div class="body">
          <h3>Rouleau Quartz Rose</h3>
          <p>Rouleau de massage visage en Quartz Rose. Technique ancestrale de médecine traditionnelle chinoise.</p>
          <div class="price-line"><span class="price-new">19,90 €</span></div>
          <div class="tagbar"><span class="tag">Idée cadeau</span><span class="tag">Soin visage</span></div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section container kpisWrap" id="chiffres">
    <h2 class="h2">Les effets en chiffres</h2>
    <p class="section-intro">D'après les retours clients et en boutique sur l'utilisation régulière :</p>
    <div class="kpis">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="num counter" data-target="92">0</div><div class="lab">% se sentent plus détendus après 1 min</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="num counter" data-target="78">0</div><div class="lab">% disent "débrancher la tête" le soir</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="num counter" data-target="64">0</div><div class="lab">% l'utilisent au travail en pic de stress</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="num counter" data-target="30">0</div><div class="lab">secondes suffisent souvent</div></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section container" id="infos">
    <h2 class="h2">Infos boutique</h2>
    <div class="info-wrapper reveal">
      <img class="shop-photo skel" src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_31dc5132f5aa4a5e9a27159e05872e27~mv2.png" alt="Façade — Tribu Nature à Vif" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
      <div class="shop-block">
        <div class="shop-details">
          <div class="key">Établissement</div><div class="val">Tribu Nature</div>
          <div class="key">Catégorie</div><div class="val">Boutique de cadeaux à Vif</div>
          <div class="key">Adresse</div><div class="val">9 Pl. des 11 Otages, 38450 Vif</div>
          <div class="key">Horaires</div>
          <div class="val">
            <div><strong>Mardi</strong> : 09:30–12:00, 15:00–18:00</div>
            <div>Mercredi : 09:30–12:00, 15:00–18:00</div>
            <div>Jeudi : 09:30–12:00, 15:00–18:00</div>
            <div>Vendredi : 09:30–12:00, 15:00–18:00</div>
            <div>Samedi : 09:30–12:30</div>
            <div>Dimanche : Fermé</div>
            <div>Lundi : Fermé</div>
          </div>
          <div class="key">Note</div>
          <div class="val">
            <div class="rating-line">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:4px"><span class="star"></span><span class="star"></span><span class="star"></span><span class="star"></span><span class="star" style="opacity:.35"></span></div>
              <div>4,4 (19 avis)</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="short-ctas">
          <a class="btn primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.google.com/maps?q=Tribu+nature+9+Place+des+11+Otages+38450+Vif">📍 Itinéraire Google</a>
          <a class="btn ghost" href="#decouvrir">🏪 Découvrir nos Box</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section container reviewsTN" id="avis" aria-labelledby="avis-title">
    <div class="header">
      <h2 class="h2" id="avis-title" style="margin-bottom:0">Ils en parlent <span class="small" style="opacity:.7">— Avis Google</span></h2>
      <p class="sub">Qui de mieux que nos clients pour décrire l'ambiance de la boutique ?</p>
    </div>
    <div class="slider" aria-roledescription="carousel">
      <button class="arrow left" aria-label="Avis précédent">&#8249;</button>
      <div class="slides" id="slides">
        <div class="slide"><div class="frame"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><div class="quote">"Une adorable boutique pleine de charme au cœur du village de Vif ! L'ambiance du lieu est chaleureuse et apaisante. On trouve toujours des petites pépites pour soi ou à offrir :)"</div><div class="author"><span class="badge-round">C</span><span>Carine Nicolas — il y a 2 mois</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="slide"><div class="frame"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><div class="quote">"Très belle boutique avec un accueil chaleureux ! Je recommande vivement !"</div><div class="author"><span class="badge-round">C</span><span>Celia Fabris — il y a 3 mois</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="slide"><div class="frame"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><div class="quote">"Superbe boutique et les gérants sont très agréables. Concernant la partie 'colis' je n'ai jamais eu de problème, toujours à temps."</div><div class="author"><span class="badge-round">N</span><span>Nathalie 38 — il y a 4 mois</span></div></div></div>
        <div class="slide"><div class="frame"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><div class="quote">"Bonjour — Je ne trouve pas de numéro de téléphone pour vous joindre, j'ai un colis …"</div><div class="author"><span class="badge-round">S</span><span>Rodriguez Sophie — il y a 3 mois</span></div></div></div>
      </div>
      <button class="arrow right" aria-label="Avis suivant">&#8250;</button>
      <div class="slider-dots" id="dots" aria-label="Pagination"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:18px">
      <a class="btn primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.google.com/maps?q=Tribu+nature+9+Place+des+11+Otages+38450+Vif">⭐ Lire / Laisser un avis sur Google</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section container" id="reseaux">
    <h2 class="h2">Suivez-nous</h2>
    <div class="social">
      <div class="social-card">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <span aria-hidden="true"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><defs><linearGradient id="ig2" x1="0" y1="24" x2="24" y2="0"><stop stop-color="#FEDA75"/><stop offset="0.35" stop-color="#FA7E1E"/><stop offset="0.6" stop-color="#D62976"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#4F5BD5"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="2.2" y="2.2" width="19.6" height="19.6" rx="5.2" stroke="url(#ig2)" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4.2" stroke="url(#ig2)" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1.3" fill="url(#ig2)"/></svg></span>
          <div><strong>Instagram</strong><div class="small">Nouveautés &amp; coulisses</div></div>
        </div>
        <a class="btn primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.instagram.com/tribunature/">Suivre</a>
      </div>
      <div class="social-card">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <span aria-hidden="true"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="4" fill="#1877F2"/><path d="M15.5 8.5h-1.8c-.6 0-.7 .3-.7 .7v1.6h2.4l-.3 2.4h-2.1V20h-2.5v-6.8H8.5v-2.4H10V9.1c0-1.9 1.1-3.1 3.2-3.1h2.3v2.5z" fill="white"/></svg></span>
          <div><strong>Facebook</strong><div class="small">Posts &amp; Reels boutique</div></div>
        </div>
        <a class="btn ghost" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Tribu-Nature-61553777519398/?locale=fr_FR">Suivre</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<footer class="footer container">
  <div>© 2025 Tribu Nature — Maquette de site vitrine</div>
  <div class="brandline">
    <span class="pill">Palette : beige &amp; doré</span>
    <span class="pill">Style : premium / bien-être</span>
  </div>
  <div class="small" style="margin-top:10px">Contact : <a href="mailto:boutiquetribunature@gmail.com" style="color:var(--gold)">boutiquetribunature@gmail.com</a></div>
  <div class="small" style="opacity:.6;margin-top:8px">Créé par <a href="https://www.agence-clics.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="color:var(--gold);font-weight:600">Clics.</a></div>
  <div class="footer-legal"><button type="button" onclick="openModal('legalModal')">Conditions légales</button></div>
</footer>

<!-- MODALE BAGUE D'ACUPRESSION -->
<div class="lightbox" id="boxRelax" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="panel" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="boxRelaxTitle" aria-modal="true">
    <div class="panel-head">
      <h3 id="boxRelaxTitle">Bague d'acupression — Détente &amp; calme intérieur</h3>
      <button class="close-btn" data-close>Fermer ✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-text">
      <p>Auto massage pour lâcher prise. Retrouver Quiétude &amp; sérénité.</p>
      <div class="benefits">
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Détente mains, nuque et épaules.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Recentrage respiratoire.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Aide à l'endormissement.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Diminue le stress et l'angoisse.</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="price-line"><span style="opacity:.75">Prix :</span><span class="price-new">9 € l'unité</span></div>
      <p class="small" style="margin-top:6px;opacity:.8">Matière : <strong>Acier</strong>. Les couleurs seront <strong>aléatoires</strong>.</p>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(155,110,42,.08);border:1px solid rgba(155,110,42,.2);font-size:.9rem">📦 <strong>Pochon</strong> et <strong>carte explicative</strong> inclus</div>
      <div class="panel-cta">
        <a class="btn primary" href="https://buy.stripe.com/00w6oI7wqao25hm4Locs800" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Passer commande</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-gallery">
      <div class="gallery-mini">
        <img class="skel" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bague d'acupression – vue 1" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
        <img class="skel" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bague d'acupression – vue 2" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
        <img class="skel" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bague d'acupression – vue 3" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODALE BOX ÉNERGIE -->
<div class="lightbox" id="boxEnergie" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="panel" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="boxEnergieTitle" aria-modal="true">
    <div class="panel-head">
      <h3 id="boxEnergieTitle">Poupées "tracas" artisanales pour dissiper les soucis</h3>
      <button class="close-btn" data-close>Fermer ✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-text">
      <p>Poupées de soucis artisanales et rituel apaisant pour accompagner la fin de journée.</p>
      <div class="benefits">
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Poupées de soucis pour accueillir les petits tracas.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Rituel apaisant à pratiquer chaque soir.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Support pour libérer tensions, colère ou frustration de la journée en se confiant aux poupées que l'on glisse ensuite sous l'oreiller pour passer une belle nuit.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Carte explicative de la poupée incluse.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Un petit quartz rose offert 🌸</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="price-line"><span style="opacity:.75">Prix :</span><span class="price-new">9,97 €</span></div>
      <div class="panel-cta">
        <a class="btn primary" href="https://buy.stripe.com/9B67sM9EygMq9xCb9Mcs802" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Passer commande</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-gallery">
      <div class="gallery-mini">
        <img class="skel" src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_586e7600beba46a7ab89dd0d9e79e618~mv2.png" alt="Poupées de soucis – vue 1" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
        <img class="skel" src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_6402a3cbc56845f081291da8f649c213~mv2.png" alt="Poupées de soucis – vue 2" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODALE ROULEAU QUARTZ ROSE -->
<div class="lightbox" id="boxDecouverte" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="panel" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="boxDecouverteTitle" aria-modal="true">
    <div class="panel-head">
      <h3 id="boxDecouverteTitle">Rouleau de massage visage en Quartz Rose</h3>
      <button class="close-btn" data-close>Fermer ✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-text">
      <p>Technique ancestrale de médecine traditionnelle chinoise qui utilise un outil en pierre.</p>
      <div class="benefits">
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Améliore la circulation sanguine.</span></div>
        <div class="benefit"><span class="tick">✔</span><span>Améliore l'éclat de la peau en stimulant la production de collagène.</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="price-line"><span style="opacity:.75">Prix :</span><span class="price-new">19,90 €</span></div>
      <div class="panel-cta">
        <a class="btn primary" href="https://buy.stripe.com/28EaEY7wqcwah04gu6cs801" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Passer commande</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-gallery">
      <div class="gallery-mini">
        <img class="skel" src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_acd2fe68fddf493eaf7d304a503c5c5c~mv2.png" alt="Rouleau Quartz Rose – vue 1" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
        <img class="skel" src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/fc3f03_ac3f33f441cf458199438762a6940e90~mv2.png" alt="Rouleau Quartz Rose – vue 2" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODALE CONDITIONS LÉGALES -->
<div class="lightbox" id="legalModal" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="panel" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="legalModalTitle" aria-modal="true">
    <div class="panel-head">
      <h3 id="legalModalTitle">Conditions légales</h3>
      <button class="close-btn" data-close>Fermer ✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-text" style="font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.5;max-height:70vh;overflow:auto">
      <h4>🔵 1. MENTIONS LÉGALES</h4>
      <p>Le présent site est édité par :<br><b>LYKEN</b><br>SAS immatriculée au RCS de Grenoble<br>SIREN : <b>922 356 761</b><br>Siège social : <b>9 Place des 11 Otages, 38450 Vif, France</b><br>Directeur de la publication : Le représentant légal de la société LYKEN</p>
      <h4>🟣 2. CONDITIONS GÉNÉRALES DE VENTE</h4>
      <p><b>2.1</b> Les présentes CGV régissent les ventes de produits par LYKEN via ce site.</p>
      <p><b>2.2</b> Prix exprimés en euros (€), TTC. Le paiement intégral est exigé avant expédition.</p>
      <p><b>2.3</b> Livraison : France métropolitaine, 2 à 5 jours ouvrés (indicatifs).</p>
      <h4>🔴 3. CLAUSES MÉDICALES</h4>
      <p>Les produits vendus par LYKEN ne sont pas des dispositifs médicaux. Ils ne remplacent pas un avis médical. LYKEN décline toute responsabilité en cas de réaction cutanée ou allergie.</p>
      <h4>🟢 4. DROIT DE RÉTRACTATION</h4>
      <p>14 jours à compter de la réception du produit, sauf produits ouverts pour raisons d'hygiène.</p>
      <h4>🔵 5. POLITIQUE DE CONFIDENTIALITÉ (RGPD)</h4>
      <p><b>Responsable :</b> LYKEN, SAS – SIREN 922 356 761.<br>Données collectées : nom, adresse, email, commandes, cookies.<br>Droits : accès, rectification, suppression, portabilité, opposition.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="img-zoom lightbox" id="imgZoom" aria-hidden="true" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
  <button class="close-btn" data-close-img style="position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px">Fermer ✕</button>
  <img id="zoomImg" alt="Aperçu" style="max-width:95vw;max-height:90vh;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 40px 100px rgba(44,31,14,.4);border:1px solid rgba(44,31,14,.15)">
</div>

<script>
document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img=>{try{img.loading='eager';img.removeAttribute('loading');}catch(e){}});
const ioReveal=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('is-visible');ioReveal.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.15});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.media,.section').forEach(el=>{if(!el.classList.contains('is-visible'))ioReveal.observe(el);});
const counters=[...document.querySelectorAll('.counter')];
const ioCount=new IntersectionObserver((ents,ob)=>{ents.forEach(ent=>{if(ent.isIntersecting){animateCounter(ent.target);ob.unobserve(ent.target);}});},{threshold:.55});
counters.forEach(c=>ioCount.observe(c));
function animateCounter(el){const target=+el.dataset.target;const dur=1400,st=performance.now();function tick(now){const p=Math.min(1,(now-st)/dur),e=1-Math.pow(1-p,3);el.textContent=Math.round(target*e);if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(tick);}if(matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce)').matches){el.textContent=target;return;}requestAnimationFrame(tick);}
(function(){const slides=document.getElementById('slides');if(!slides)return;const items=[...slides.children];const dotsWrap=document.getElementById('dots');let idx=0;items.forEach((_,i)=>{const d=document.createElement('span');d.className='dot'+(i===0?' active':'');d.dataset.i=i;dotsWrap.appendChild(d);});function go(i){idx=(i+items.length)%items.length;slides.style.transform=`translateX(-${idx*100}%)`;dotsWrap.querySelectorAll('.dot').forEach((d,j)=>d.classList.toggle('active',j===idx));}document.querySelector('.arrow.left')?.addEventListener('click',()=>go(idx-1));document.querySelector('.arrow.right')?.addEventListener('click',()=>go(idx+1));dotsWrap.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target.classList.contains('dot'))go(+e.target.dataset.i);});})();
const cards=[...document.querySelectorAll('.box-card[data-modal]')];
const modals=[...document.querySelectorAll('.lightbox')].filter(m=>m.id!=='imgZoom');
function openModal(id){const m=document.getElementById(id);if(!m)return;m.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}
function closeModal(m){m.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');document.body.style.overflow='';}
cards.forEach(c=>{const id=c.dataset.modal;c.addEventListener('click',()=>openModal(id));c.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();openModal(id);}});});
document.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(btn=>{btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{const modal=btn.closest('.lightbox');if(modal)closeModal(modal);});});
modals.forEach(m=>{m.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===m)closeModal(m);});});
window.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape'){const opened=[...modals].find(m=>m.getAttribute('aria-hidden')==='false');if(opened)closeModal(opened);}});
document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img=>{img.addEventListener('load',()=>{const p=img.closest('.skel');if(p)p.classList.remove('skel');},{once:true});img.addEventListener('error',()=>{const p=img.closest('.skel');if(p)p.classList.remove('skel');img.style.objectFit='contain';img.style.background='rgba(44,31,14,.06)';img.setAttribute('data-error','true');if(!img.src.startsWith('data:'))img.src='data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="8" height="6" viewBox="0 0 8 6"><rect width="8" height="6" fill="%23ede0cf"/></svg>';},{once:true});});
(function(){const zoom=document.getElementById('imgZoom');const zoomImg=document.getElementById('zoomImg');function openZoom(src,alt){zoomImg.src=src;zoomImg.alt=alt||'';zoom.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}function closeZoom(){zoom.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');zoomImg.src='';document.body.style.overflow='';}zoom.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===zoom||e.target.hasAttribute('data-close-img'))closeZoom();});window.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape'&&zoom.getAttribute('aria-hidden')==='false')closeZoom();});document.addEventListener('click',e=>{const img=e.target.closest('img');if(!img)return;if(img.closest('a,button,[data-modal],.box-card,.arrow,[onclick]'))return;if(img.dataset.error==='true')return;e.preventDefault();openZoom(img.currentSrc||img.src,img.alt);},{capture:true});})();
document.querySelectorAll('.nav .menu-toggle').forEach(btn=>{btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{const nav=btn.parentElement;const isOpen=nav.classList.toggle('menu-open');btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded',isOpen?'true':'false');});});
</script>
</body>
</html>
